description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on push to main and on create events. Use a matrix strategy to build wheels on ubuntu-22.04, windows-2022, and macos-10.15. For each job, check out the code, set up QEMU if on Linux, set up Python 3.x, install dependencies, build wheels with cibuildwheel, upload wheels as an artifact, and publish to PyPI if a tag is created.
